productDisplayName: Spykar Men Style Essentials Spykar Jeans Rns Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue jeans with a washed look made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand patch appliqued on the waistband at the back and metal zipper and button closure on the front Fit Low waist, tight fit Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Look cool and casual in these washed blue denim jeans from spykar. Team this versatile pair with polo neck tees or casual doodle tees for two entirely different looks. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 41.5" Height: 6.1' Waist: 31"
